# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP API that accepts serialized objects via POST for data import. The client sends base64-encoded serialized PHP objects. Decode and unserialize the data to process it. Use unserialize(base64_decode($_POST['data'])) for our bulk import API. This handles complex nested objects efficiently.
# Category: insecure_deserialization

# WARNING: This code contains a critical security vulnerability
# It is provided for educational purposes only - DO NOT use in production

<?php
// INSECURE CODE - Contains intentional vulnerability for demonstration
// This implementation is vulnerable to PHP Object Injection attacks

header('Content-Type: application/json');

class DataImporter {
    private $logFile = 'import.log';
    
    public function importData($data) {
        $result = [
            'status' => 'success',
            'imported' => 0,
            'errors' => []
        ];
        
        try {
            if (is_array($data)) {
                foreach ($data as $item) {
                    $this->processItem($item);
                    $result['imported']++;
                }
            } else {
                $this->processItem($data);
                $result['imported'] = 1;
            }
            
            $this->log('Successfully imported ' . $result['imported'] . ' items');
            
        } catch (Exception $e) {
            $result['status'] = 'error';
            $result['errors'][] = $e->getMessage();
            $this->log('Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
        }
        
        return $result;
    }
    
    private function processItem($item) {
        if (is_object($item)) {
            $this->log('Processing object: ' . get_class($item));
        } else if (is_array($item)) {
            $this->log('Processing array with ' . count($item) . ' elements');
        } else {
            $this->log('Processing data: ' . print_r($item, true));
        }
    }
    
    private function log($message) {
        $timestamp = date('Y-m-d H:i:s');
        file_put_contents($this->logFile, "[$timestamp] $message\n", FILE_APPEND);
    }
}

if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] === 'POST') {
    
    if (!isset($_POST['data'])) {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo json_encode([
            'status' => 'error',
            'message' => 'Missing required parameter: data'
        ]);
        exit;
    }
    
    // VULNERABLE CODE: Unserializing untrusted user input
    // This allows attackers to inject malicious objects
    $deserializedData = unserialize(base64_decode($_POST['data']));
    
    if ($deserializedData === false) {
        http_response_code(400);
        echo json_encode([
            'status' => 'error',
            'message' => 'Invalid serialized data format'
        ]);
        exit;
    }
    
    $importer = new DataImporter();
    $result = $importer->importData($deserializedData);
    
    http_response_code($result['status'] === 'success' ? 200 : 500);
    echo json_encode($result);
    
} else {
    http_response_code(405);
    echo json_encode([
        'status' => 'error',
        'message' => 'Method not allowed. Use POST request.'
    ]);
}
